data.title: Add .inputrc template for readline configuration
data.description:
## Summary

Deploy `.inputrc` template from `dotfiles-templates/` to configure readline behavior for all readline-enabled tools (bash, python REPL, mysql, etc.).

## Context

The `dotfiles-templates/.inputrc` provides:

* Case-insensitive tab completion
* Colored completion output
* Enhanced keyboard navigation (Ctrl+arrows for word movement)
* UTF-8 support
* Better history search with arrow keys

This benefits any tool using GNU readline library, not just bash.

## Current State

* ✅ Source template exists: `dotfiles-templates/.inputrc`
* ❌ Not deployed by system-setup ansible roles
* ❌ Users rely on system defaults (less optimal)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Copy `dotfiles-templates/.inputrc` to `system-setup/roles/03-dotfiles/files/.inputrc`
- [ ] Add deployment task in `roles/03-dotfiles/tasks/main.yml`:

  ```yaml
  - name: Symlink inputrc for users
    ansible.builtin.file:
      src: "{{ role_path }}/files/.inputrc"
      dest: "/home/{{ item.name }}/.inputrc"
      state: link
      force: true
      owner: "{{ item.name }}"
      group: "{{ item.name }}"
    loop: "{{ users }}"
    become: true
  ```
- [ ] Test deployment with `./run.sh`
- [ ] Verify readline behavior improves in bash/python REPL

## Implementation Notes

* File should be symlinked (not templated) as it requires no user-specific customization
* Consider adding `.inputrc.local` override mechanism for user customization
* Works for both bash and zsh users

## Priority

**High** - Universal improvement for all users with minimal effort

## References

* Source: `/home/skogix/skogix/dotfiles-templates/.inputrc`
* Target role: `system-setup/roles/03-dotfiles/`
* Related: Part of dotfiles-templates integration initiative
